changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Add canonical_example to competencies; single reference question per competency (replaces question_packages).

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Backfill canonical_example from question_packages (default or first primary_question_text per competency).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE competencies c SET canonical_example = ( SELECT qp.primary_question_text FROM question_packages qp WHERE qp.competency_id = c.id AND qp.is_deleted = false ORDER BY qp.is_default DESC, qp.created_at LIMIT 1 ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM question_packages qp2 WHERE qp2.competency_id = c.id AND qp2.is_deleted = false );

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Store the AI-delivered primary question for audit; outcome tracing remains by competency_id.
